command: echo '=== 1. Find PG password ===' && grep -i 'POSTGRES' /opt/p0-foundation/.env 2>/dev/null && echo '---' && grep -i 'POSTGRES' /opt/p0-foundation/docker-compose.yml 2>/dev/null && echo '---' && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 env 2>/dev/null | grep -i POSTGRES && echo '=== 2. Current PG_URL ===' && cat /opt/claude-code/env/claude.env | grep PG_URL && echo '=== 3. Try connecting with docker env password ===' && PG_PASS=$(docker exec n8n-postgres-1 env 2>/dev/null | grep POSTGRES_PASSWORD | cut -d= -f2-) && echo "Password length: ${#PG_PASS}" && echo "Password starts with: ${PG_PASS:0:5}..."
intent: find actual PG password to fix PG_URL
